title: Greek Dolmades

ingredientGroups.title: For the filling
items: ½ bunch spring onions, finely chopped
Vine leaves in a brine solution

steps: Fry the onion in 60 ml oil for 5 minutes. Add the garlic and spring onions and fry for another 5 minutes.
Rinse the rice well and fry for 2 minutes together with the onions
Add the herbs, lemon zest, capers, salt and pepper and nutmeg.
Add 625 ml water and cook until all the water has been absorbed. Let the rice cool.
Rinse the leaves under running water.
In a pot, line the bottom with leaves and lay the lemon slices on top. This stops the dolmades from sticking at the bottom of the pot.
Place the leaf on a flat surface and put some of the rice on the wide side. Fold the leaf closed like a burrito.
Pack your rolled leaves tightly next to each other in the pot. You can pack them in layers.
In a jug mix 500 ml boiling water, 60 ml olive oil and 90 ml lemon juice. Pour it over the rolled vine leaves in the pot. It should just barely cover them.
Put a plate or something heavy on top of the dolmades and let them simmer gently for
